jobTitle: PhD positions at the IMPRS "The Leipzig School of Human Origins" in Leipzig, Germany
jobDescription: We invite online applications for the International Max Planck Research School “The Leipzig School of Human Origins” (IMPRS LSHO, www.leipzig-school.eva.mpg.de), an international Ph.D. program of the Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology and the University of Leipzig. We provide interdisciplinary training and research opportunities for excellent young scientists who wish to work towards a Ph.D. in anthropology, biology, biochemistry, bioinformatics, evolutionary genetics, human behavioral ecology, psychology, and related fields. Candidates may apply with selected research groups from the following disciplines: Discipline 1: Molecular Anthropology Discipline 2: Human History, Evolution and Ecology Discipline 3: Language, Culture and Cognition Graduate students will be accepted to only one of these areas but will have the opportunity to take part in courses and seminars in all of them. The PhD positions are open for international students, and it normally takes three to four years to finish one’s PhD.
